saved_searches.name: Exposed Local LLM Services
saved_searches.kql: ai_sentinel.finding.type : "local_ai_service" and not destination.ip : "127.0.0.1" and not destination.ip : "::1"

saved_searches.name: Pipeline Failures
saved_searches.kql: event.outcome : "failure" or tags : "_jsonparsefailure" or ai_sentinel.ingest.error.message : * or error.message : *
